title: Cynorkis citrina
intro: Cynorkis citrina, commonly known as the yellow Cynorkis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Cynorkis. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various ailments. The bioactive constituents of Cynorkis citrina include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and digestive problems.
